name: Gardevoir and Lopunny (Pokemon Plushies)
description:
It appears that you recently bought the Life-Sized plushies of a specific pair of pokemon that have a certain kind of 'Fans'. It turns out they might not be as 'Inanimate' as you might have expected when you bought them.

A non OC plushie Bot. I hope you folks enjoy.

The picturre is a cropped and edited version of this art: Here by the artist Gattito

Sorry for taking so long without any bots, I have a few bots I'll release soon-ish.
